fetch_note: GitHub Discussions require GraphQL API access. MCP API does not expose a Discussions endpoint. Run locally: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } answer { author { login } createdAt } } } } }' to populate this file.
